channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: NBA fan leaves game on stretcher after shooting challenge goes awry
item.description: An Atlanta Hawks fan slipped and injured his knee during a fan challenge as the team lost to the Portland Trail Blazers on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: WWE star Cody Rhodes explains why John Cena WrestleMania 41 matchup feels like 'first-time-ever' ordeal
item.description: WWE champion Cody Rhodes talked to Fox News Digital about John Cena's heel turn, which turned the pro wrestling world upside down ahead of WrestleMania 41.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: After cheating death, Dodgers pitcher Dustin May makes his way back to the mound a changed man
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Dustin May took the mound for the Los Angeles Dodgers a changed man. Making his first major league start since May 17, 2023, he allowed just one hit and an unearned run over five innings in the Dodgers' 3-1 victory over the Atlanta Braves on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: King fans 11 in 7-0 win against Guardians as the Padres are off to 1st 6-0 start
item.description: SAN DIEGO (AP) — Michael King struck out 11 in five innings and Jackson Merrill homered for the San Diego Padres, who started 6-0 for the first time in their 57-season history by beating the Cleveland Guardians 7-0 on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: BERNIE WILSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Here's how the new NFL rules on kickoffs and overtime will work
item.description: The one-year trial version of the dynamic kickoff in the NFL led to an uptick in the return rate that wasn't quite as much as the league had hoped.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jokes abound as Dodgers' Freddie Freeman misses 2nd game while recovering from shower slip and fall
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Freddie Freeman is hearing it after he slipped and fell in the shower, injuring his surgically repaired right ankle and missing his second straight game for the Los Angeles Dodgers. “Freak accident, you can’t really make it up, crazy,” Freeman said Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Caleb Williams' development, Bears search for "weapons" and Kyler Gordon's contract extension with The Athletic's Kevin Fishbain
item.description: The Chicago Bears are looking to develop Caleb Williams and use their top draft picks to bolster their offense, while also focusing on adding a dynamic running back and working on a contract extension for Kyler Gordon.
item.dc:creator: Kaitlin Sharkey, WGN 9

item.title: Chargers' Jim Harbaugh 'disturbed' by hacking allegations against former Michigan assistant coach
item.description: Jim Harbaugh said Monday he was "shocked" by allegations in a federal indictment against one of his former Michigan staffers, Matt Weiss.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: In recruiting battle, lawmakers weigh whether to give college athletes a tax break on NIL earnings
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Illinois state Rep. Travis Weaver remembers how surreal it felt having Heisman Trophy winner Mark Ingram sit a few rows behind him in a political science class. He will never forget the pure joy in Alabama every time the Crimson Tide rolled to the national championship, either.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Rays prepare for Tampa home opener
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (WFLA) — The Tampa Bay Rays have their home opener for their season at Steinbrenner Field on Friday. The game is already a sell out. Seating capacity at this years games will be greatly reduced, due to major hurricane damage at Tropicana Field.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Patterson, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Rail service to and from Petco Park expands for Padres season
item.description: The North County Transit District is expanding COASTER service to provide fans with a safe and convenient way to get to and from Petco Park on Padres game days.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5
